markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 622. Spec. Provisions & Exceptions for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 622.071 — Definition

In this subchapter, “special mobile equipment” has the meaning assigned by Section 541.201 (Vehicles) .

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: In this subchapter, “special mobile equipment” has the meaning assigned by Section 541.201 (Vehicles) .
